mapper.select: select approvalid, approvalname, seq, approverid, approvername from cotdl.tbl_piiapprovaluser order by approvalid, approverid
mapper.insert: insert into COTDL.tbl_piiapprovaluser (approvalid, approvalname, seq, approverid, approvername) values (#{approvalid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{approvalname, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{seq}, #{approverid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{approvername, jdbcType=VARCHAR})

insert into COTDL.tbl_piiapprovaluser (approvalid, approvalname, seq, approverid, approvername) values (#{approvalid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{approvalname, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{seq}, #{approverid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{approvername, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.select: select approvalid, approvalname, seq, phase from cotdl.tbl_piiapproval order by approvalid
